Partners

Better data, used properly

More data does not equal more growth. Value appears when account intelligence connects to CRM and sales process.

Consult Rotata Solutions
01

Context

Context

Better data only creates value when it is structured, filtered and connected to the commercial workflow.

Node 01

Current operating context

Node 02

Commercial process reality

Node 03

Data and CRM dependency

02

Friction

Problem

More contacts can create more noise. Without targeting logic, data quality rules and CRM routing, teams burn time on the wrong accounts.

Node 01

Messy data

Node 02

Unclear ownership

Node 03

Weak visibility

Node 04

Manual follow-up

03

System layer

What Rotata does

We turn ZoomInfo into a usable data layer: ICP definition, segmentation, enrichment logic, routing, lists and CRM activation.

01Diagnose

Map the current setup and identify structural blockers.

02Design

Define the operating model, data rules and conversion path.

03Implement

Configure the system in tools the team already uses.

04Measure

Connect dashboards and feedback loops to business decisions.

04

Proof

Outcomes

The output is not a larger database. It is cleaner targeting, better prioritization and data that supports pipeline decisions.

01

Cleaner data

02

Clearer prioritization

03

Better handoffs

04

More useful reporting

05

Operating model

When it is relevant

Use this when teams need to improve targeting, enrich CRM records, validate segments or support outbound with better account data.

Node 01

CRM adoption problems

Node 02

Pipeline visibility issues

Node 03

Sales and marketing misalignment

Node 04

Growth activity without a system

06

Process

System integration

ZoomInfo feeds the growth system through HubSpot properties, workflows, campaigns, outbound sequences and reporting.

Consult

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
